scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,client,admin -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix client-site" "npm run dev --prefix admin-site"
scripts.build: concurrently -n client,admin "npm run build --prefix client-site" "npm run build --prefix admin-site"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,client,admin -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm start --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix client-site" "npm start --prefix admin-site"
